chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6587 of 2016 CP D 6588 of 2016 CP D 6589 of 2016 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.25855/2020 2. For hearing of Misc. No.33094/2016 3. For hearing of Misc. No.31639/2016 4. For hearing of main case. 28-03-2025 Mr. Jawaid Farooqui, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent. Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent in C.P. No.D- 6588/2016. Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. In these petitions the petitioners had assailed show cause notices directly in the writ jurisdiction. Learned counsel states that the Order-in- Original has been passed, however, due to these petitions the proceedings have been halted. Learned counsel states that the petitioners shall not pursue these petitions and shall file the respective appeals within a period of 20 days and subject to the compliance of the timeline seeks that no further coercive action be taken against the petitioners pending determination of the said appeals. Learned counsel for respondents department articulate no cavil to the aforesaid and state that the petitions may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is directed to place copy hereof in the connected petitions. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
